scripts.build: cd FrontEnd/vite-project && pwd && echo '=== Before install ===' && ls -la && npm install 2>&1 && echo '=== After install ===' && ls -la node_modules/.bin/ && echo '=== Building ===' && npm run build 2>&1 && echo '=== After build ===' && ls -la && echo '=== Checking dist ===' && (ls -la dist/ || echo 'DIST FOLDER NOT CREATED')
